creator: chris@netmonger.net
text:
[I sent this earlier, but I don't think it went through due to an error
on my part.]

On Tue, Aug 14, 2001 at 10:15:51PM -0700, John Merryweather Cooper wrote:
> During the linking stage of the build, libtool fails stating that it cannon find library `'
> >How-To-Repeat:
> Attempt to build gnomedb port.  I even pkg_delete -a -f everything and rebuilt from scratch; no dice . . . :(

This is somehow related to having libgda-0.2.90_2, and the
/usr/X11R6/lib/libgda-clientcpp.la which it installs, which has a
dependency_libs in it containing -pthread, which in turn the libtool
in gnomedb cannot handle.
-- 
Christopher Masto         Senior Network Monkey      NetMonger Communications
